name: Search Bar
description: A search input field optimized for AI-driven information discovery.

guidelines.purpose: Search Bar provides a high-visibility entry point for global or contextual searches. It is styled to match the AI interaction language of the system.

anatomy.container: aitinput class with flex-direction: row and padding: var(--sizing-200) var(--sizing-300).
anatomy.icon: 18xvar(--font-size-112) search icon (magnifying glass) with var(--color-content-tertiary) color.

specs.font: System primary font, var(--sizing-400) placeholder text.
